title: cephalotaceae
intro: The Cephalotaceae rank refers to a family of plants that includes a group of species commonly known as dog's mercury or liverworts. This family is characterized by its small, leafy plants that typically grow in damp, shaded areas. Cephalotaceae plants often have a distinctive appearance, with oval-shaped leaves and a reddish-brown or greenish color. They are usually found in temperate regions and are often associated with woodland environments.
